commands.description: Show priority auction status.
Show referral status for the configured signer.
Create a live limit, market, stop-loss, take-profit, stop-limit, take-limit, or verified outcome limit order. Supports optional per-order builder fee params.

args.description: Perpetual coin such as BTC, supported spot pair, or outcome notation (#<encoding> or +<encoding>) for verified outcome limit orders.
HIP-3 DEX name.
Order side.
Limit price. For stop-loss and take-profit market trigger orders, also accepted as a legacy trigger price.
Trigger price for stop-loss, take-profit, stop-limit, and take-limit orders.
Base-asset size. Required for limit and trigger-limit orders.
Quote-sized amount in USDC. Required for market orders.
Order type: limit, market, market-trigger, or trigger-limit.
Time in force: gtc, ioc, or alo.
Only reduce an existing perpetual position; spot markets are not supported.
Maximum slippage bound in basis points for market orders. Default 500; allowed range 1-1000.
Take-profit trigger price for a normal-tpsl child order.
Stop-loss trigger price for a normal-tpsl child order.
Parent-attached TP/SL grouping. orders create requires normal-tpsl when TP/SL children are present.
Acting-account selector for vaultAddress: subaccount/vault address, wallet name, or wallet id.
Margin mode intent for perpetual orders. Defaults to cross.
Builder address to receive the additional order fee. Requires --builder-fee-rate.
Builder fee rate percent string, e.g. 0.001%. Requires --builder.
0x-prefixed 16-byte client order id.
Skip confirmation prompt for deliberate automation.

Only reduce an existing perpetual position.

Margin mode intent for perpetual orders. Defaults to cross.

commands.description: Send structured CLI feedback as a scenario JSON object to the configured feedback service.

args.description: Structured scenario JSON object describing the command, context, expected behavior, and actual behavior. Mutually exclusive with scenario_file.

Optional comma-separated labels such as bug,docs,agent.
